case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS TOM, VIRGIL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,033.40 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT TOM, VIRGIL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-12-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
